close_reason: Extracted 6 duplicated helpers into shared mock_helpers module
description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:386-447 and 573-634. Six helpers (make_pair, make_backend, respond, secret_json, not_found_json, forbidden_json) are duplicated identically in two test modules. Idiomatic Rust would put them in a single #[cfg(test)] mod test_helpers used by both test mods via 'use super::test_helpers::*;'. Maintenance cost: any change to mock shape (e.g. asserting request bodies — see issue 5) must be applied twice and will drift.
title: Mock test helpers duplicated verbatim between get_mock_tests and put_mock_tests
